sampling_scheme: 6x/day semi-randomized prompts within 30-minute intervals with 75 minutes between intervals and a 45-minute expiration time for each prompt
additional_comments: did not convert timestamps to time columns as there is additional timezone information available; items originally in German

features.name: guilty_emotion
features.details: I feel guilty for feeling this way.
features.labels:
1 = not at all
2 = somewhat
3 = partly
4 = very much
5 = completely

features.name: out_of_control
features.details: I feel out of control.
features.labels:
1 = not at all
2 = somewhat
3 = partly
4 = very much
5 = completely
features.construct: control loss, emotion dysregulation, emotion regulation

features.details: I am embarrassed for feeling this way.

1 = not at all
2 = somewhat

4 = very much
5 = completely

5 = completely

5 = completely

features.name: affect_grid_x
features.details: Please select a point on the grid that best represents how you feel at this moment. (x-axis)

features.name: affect_grid_y
features.details: Please select a point on the grid that best represents how you feel at this moment. (y-axis)

features.name: seek_contact_affect
features.details: ...had contact with people/ were with people to increase your positive feelings?
features.labels:
1 = Does not apply at all,
2 = Applies somewhat,
3 = Applies fairly well,
4 = Applies quite well,
5 = Applies completely
features.construct: social emotion regulation, emotion regulation, social behavior, social interaction

features.name: others_perspective_giving
features.details: ...experienced that other people tried to remind you to worry less or that other people are worse off?
features.labels:
1 = Does not apply at all,
2 = Applies somewhat,
3 = Applies fairly well,
4 = Applies quite well,
5 = Applies completely
features.construct: social emotion regulation, emotion regulation, social behavior, social interaction

features.name: received_comfort
features.details: ...experienced that other people tried to calm you down or to comfort you?
features.labels:
1 = Does not apply at all,
2 = Applies somewhat,
3 = Applies fairly well,
4 = Applies quite well,
5 = Applies completely
features.construct: social emotion regulation, emotion regulation, social interaction

features.name: received_coping_examples
features.details: ...learned from other people how they have dealt with an emotional situation in the past or how they would behave in your place?
features.labels:
1 = Does not apply at all,
2 = Applies somewhat,
3 = Applies fairly well,
4 = Applies quite well,
5 = Applies completely
features.construct: coping, social emotion regulation, emotion regulation, social interaction

features.name: negative_event
features.details: Have you had one or more bad experiences since the last survey? How bad was your worst experience?

features.name: positive_event
features.details: Have you had one or more good experiences since the last survey? How good was your best experience?

features.name: impulse_contact_emotion_regulation
features.details: Do you currently feel the urge to seek out another person for support in regulating your emotions?

features.name: impulse_self_regulation
features.details: Do you currently feel the urge to regulate your emotions on your own?
